title: COMPOSE companion bundle (.compose-bundle.json)
description: A companion groups worksheets under a source — a textbook, a course, or a paper. Canonical name for the worksheet list is worksheets[]; exercises[] is accepted as a legacy alias. Version policy: additive changes keep compose_bundle: 1; breaking changes bump the number and ship a migration.

title.description: Source name shown in the worksheet picker.

authors.description: Author line shown under the title.

prefix.description: Worksheet keys are grouped under the chapter whose prefix they start with.

worksheets.description: Canonical name for the worksheet list.

exercises.description: Legacy alias for worksheets — accepted, but new files should use worksheets.

meta.description: Optional provenance block, ignored by the app (W14): who wrote this, what it tracks, under what terms. source like "after Coppock & Champollion §7" operationalises the paraphrase-only copyright posture.

engineVersion.description: Grader version that saved this bundle (informational).

key.description: Library key; also the prefix-matched handle for chapter grouping and progress storage.

content.description: The worksheet as an inline JSON object (preferred).

text.description: The worksheet as a JSON string (legacy double-encoding; prefer content).
